comments.author: @jeankendling834
comments.text: Not bad except the pronunciation of the names in Tasmania, which makes me think it’s fake voice

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: Thank you for the feedback. Pronunciation can definitely be challenging with some local place names, and I appreciate you pointing it out. I'll keep working to improve that in future videos. Thanks for watching!

comments.author: @jeankendling834
comments.text: From my first visit to Tasmania, I fell in love with the place, I’ve made many trips since, I wanted to see all of this tiny Island, takes alot of time, so much to see,even though it’s a small Island, takes a lot of time to see it all❤

replies.author: @truehorizons66
replies.text: What a wonderful experience! ❤️ Tasmania may look small on the map, but it's full of incredible landscapes and hidden corners to explore. Thank you for sharing your story, and thank you so much for watching the documentary!

comments.author: @gregorymcpherson2537
comments.text: As a local Tasmanian do not trust these images.  Hobart was false, there are no Koalas in the wild, and some others look false or distorted, but then I only got to the first 7 minutes.
